title: Why Big Tech Is Pouring Billions Into AI Data Centers and Reinventing Tech Infrastructure
description: Discover how Big Tech is investing billions in AI data centers to power next-generation tech infrastructure, driving innovation, sustainability, and the future of artificial intelligence.
content:
Big Tech is in a global race to build the most advanced AI data centers, the backbone of modern tech infrastructure. These facilities power everything from chatbots and generative AI tools to large-scale cloud services.

title: Artificial Intelligence must strengthen, not override judiciary, says CJI Justice Surya Kant
description: The Chief Justice cautioned that allowing AI tools to dominate decision-making could compromise transparency and accountability within the justice delivery system. He stressed that the final stage of adjudication must remain in human hands.
content:
”AI should assist in handling large volumes of data and records, identifying patterns, and reducing procedural delays. However, it must not encroach upon the core judicial function of delivering judgments,” the CJI was quoted as saying.
By PTI

title: AI Meets Justice: Striking a Balance in the Judiciary
description: CJI Justice Surya Kant emphasizes the need to integrate Artificial Intelligence into the judiciary to enhance efficiency without overshadowing human judgment. Speaking at a seminar, he warned against AI's dominance in decision-making, advocating for AI as a supportive tool while maintaining human oversight in final judgments.
content: Chief Justice of India, Surya Kant, underscored the importance of incorporating Artificial Intelligence (AI) cautiously into the judicial system to aid rather than overshadow its core functions. He emphasized this during a seminar at the Karnataka Ju... [772 chars]

title: Pentagon Locks In Palantir AI to Power Future Military Operations
description: The Pentagon will formally adopt Palantir Technologies’s Maven artificial intelligence system as a core program across the U.S. military,.
content:
The Pentagon is moving to formally adopt Palantir Technologies’s Maven artificial intelligence system as a core program across the U.S. military, according to a letter from Deputy Defense Secretary Steve Feinberg.

content:

title: Data sovereignty emerging as key challenge in AI and cloud era

title: Crossing the ‘last mile’ of enterprise AI
description: AS ADOPTION of artificial intelligence (AI) accelerates globally, Philippine CEOs see AI as an essential fulcrum for growth and aim to integrate it into key business processes. However, while AI offers significant opportunities, large language models (LLMs) alone are not enough for mission-critical workflows because of inconsistent outputs and limited governance.
